request_payload.exposure_text: Did you know that every dollar spent on civil defense preparedness is a dollar not invested in our military's cutting-edge capabilities? While some argue for more local resilience, experts warn that this could weaken our national security posture. Our allies are increasing their defense budgets - shouldn't we focus on maintaining our technological edge instead? #NationalSecurityFirst
